UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2020, MOTION FOR PROVE-UP HEARING - GRANTED. PROPOSED JUDGMENT WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY GISELLE CASEY, #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEVANCE, CYNTHIA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAXWELL, LAURA A SEE SCANNED DOC - AS OF MAY 21, 2020, (1) PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA L. DEVANCE WAS THE SOLE OWNER IN FEE SIMPLE TITLE TO THE REAL PROPERTY LOCATED IN THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AT 115 BRITTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, AND (2) THE DEED OF TRUST EXECUTED ON APRIL 14, 1993 BY PLAINTIFF'S PREDECESSORS-IN-INTEREST CRAIG M. SHEPPARD AND BRYAN SHEPPARD IN FAVOR OF NATIONSCREDIT FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION, AND RECORDED IN THE OFFICIAL RECORDS OF THE RECORDER OF SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON APRIL 16, 1993 AS DOCUMENT F336356, REEL 859, IMAGE 0116, IS HEREBY SET ASIDE AND IS OF NO FURTHER FORCE OR EFFECT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Laura A. Maxwell
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

William F. Abbott, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Cynthia L. Devance, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Laura A. Maxwell.
Plaintiff's Complaint to Quiet Title was filed on May 1, 2015 and personally served on defendant Laura A. Maxwell on August 8, 2017.
Default as to defendant Laura A. Maxwell was entered on December 14, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 9, 2020.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. was filed today, March 10, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Cynthia L. Devance, and against the defaulted defendant Laura A. Maxwell, as follows:

As of May 21, 2020, (1) plaintiff Cynthia L. Devance was the sole owner in fee simple title to the real property located in the City & County of San Francisco at 115 Britton Street, San Francisco, CA, and (2) the Deed of Trust executed on April 14, 1993 by plaintiff's predecessors-in-interest Craig M. Sheppard and Bryan Sheppard in favor of Nationscredit Financial Services Corporation, and recorded in the official records of the Recorder of San Francisco County on April 16, 1993 as Document F336356, Reel 859, Image 0116, is hereby set aside and is of no further force or effect.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
